rulings.Case Title: BILLY S. JOHNSON VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: APPEARANCES: Jeremy D. Huie, Esq., of BASSI EDLIN HUIE & BLUM (415-403-4429), appearing for defendant / moving party Carlisle Corporation Carlos J.E. Johnson RULING: DEFENDANT CARLISLE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT The Court on its own motion continued the hearing on defendant Carlisle Corporation's motion for summary judgment to December 3, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220.
